description: Gzipped size budgets (KB) for the frontend production bundle, enforced by scripts/track-bundle-size.mjs after `vite build`. Per-chunk budgets guard the named code-split groups from vite.config.ts; the totals guard against unnoticed dependency bloat across all emitted JS/CSS. Budgets are gzipped (what CloudFront transfers) and carry deliberate headroom over observed sizes. Raise a budget only when a chunk grows for a justified reason.
